Warehouse Manager Job at Sundry Markets Limited




        
    

        
        Sundry Markets Limited - Marketsquare is Nigeria’s emerging grocery retail chain - a place where Nigerians can go to find their trusted brands of groceries at the best prices. Marketsquare was conceived from a burning sensation to create a modern and relevant retail shopping experience for Nigerians and a more convenient way for people to get their everyday needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Warehouse Manager

Job Locations: Port Harcourt - Rivers, Abuja (FCT), & Lekki - Lagos 
Job Status: Full-Time Staff

Job Summary 
     

            
    




	We're looking for an experienced Warehouse Manager who will be responsible for coordinating the receipt, storage and dispatch of goods to each point of use in the most efficient manner through liaising with suppliers and vendors.
	Keep a proper inventory of all goods and ensure an effective system for accurate stock keeping and prevention of loss.
	Forecast and plan future inventory, coach workers on proper inventory management and keep appropriate daily, weekly and monthly records.


Required Qualification


	B.Sc. / HND qualification


Required Skill:


	Good communication skills, Numerical skills, Managerial Skills, Time Management, Interpersonal skills, Technical Skills and Logical reasoning.

  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Manager",
  "description": "NeoHomes Limited is a Nigerian real estate company focused on property development, sales, and investment services, operating primarily in residential, commercial, and industrial real estate. It positions itself as a client-focused firm delivering affordable and innovative housing solutions, alongside services like project management and real estate consultancy.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Manager

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Sales Manager is responsible for developing and executing sales strategies that drive revenue growth, increase market share, and achieve the company&#39;s sales targets.
	The role oversees the sales team, manages client acquisition and retention, monitors sales performance, and ensures the effective conversion of leads into property sales.
	The Sales Manager will work closely with the Marketing, CRM, and Affiliate teams to optimize the customer journey from lead generation to successful property acquisition.


Key Responsibilities
Sales Strategy &amp; Execution:


	Develop and implement annual and quarterly sales plans aligned with company objectives.
	Drive the achievement of monthly, quarterly, and annual revenue targets.
	Identify new business opportunities and market expansion initiatives.
	Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer preferences.


Team Leadership &amp; Performance Management:


	Lead, coach, mentor, and supervise the sales team.
	Set individual and team sales targets.
	Conduct regular performance reviews and sales meetings.
	Develop and implement sales incentive programs.
	Identify training needs and facilitate continuous sales development.


Lead Conversion &amp; Revenue Generation


	Ensure efficient follow - up and conversion of qualified leads.
	Monitor sales pipeline performance and conversion rates.
	Implement strategies to improve sales productivity and customer acquisition.
	Negotiate and close high - value sales transactions.


Client Relationship Management:


	Build and maintain relationships with key clients, investors, and strategic partners.
	Ensure excellent customer experience throughout the sales process.
	Resolve escalated client concerns promptly and professionally.
	Promote customer retention and repeat business.


Collaboration &amp; Cross - Functional Coordination:


	Work closely with the Marketing Team to align campaigns with sales objectives.
	Collaborate with the CRM Team to improve lead nurturing and customer engagement.
	Partner with the Affiliate Manager to maximize referral and partnership opportunities.
	Support management in developing growth initiatives and market penetration strategies.


Reporting &amp; Analytics:


	Prepare weekly and monthly sales performance reports.
	Track sales metrics, conversion rates, revenue performance, and team productivity.
	Present sales forecasts and strategic recommendations to management.
	Maintain accurate sales records and pipeline reports.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Monthly Revenue Target Achievement (%).
	Number of Plots / Properties Sold.
	Lead - to - Sale Conversion Rate.
	Average Sales Cycle Duration.
	Sales Team Target Achievement Rate.
	Customer Retention Rate.
	New Client Acquisition Rate.
	Sales Pipeline Value.
	Collection Efficiency on Sales Transactions.
	Customer Satisfaction Score.


Qualifications &amp; Experience
Education:


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Business Administration, Marketing, Economics, Estate Management, or related discipline.
	MBA or relevant professional certification is an added advantage.


Experience:


	Minimum of 5 years of experience in sales management.
	At least 3 years in the real estate sector.
	Proven track record of achieving and exceeding sales targets.
	Experience leading and managing high - performing sales teams.


Required Competencies:
Technical Competencies:


	Sales Strategy Development.
	Revenue Forecasting.
	Negotiation and Closing Skills.
	CRM Systems Management.
	Performance Analytics.
	Pipeline Management.
	Business Development.


Behavioral Competencies:


	Leadership and Team Management.
	Strategic Thinking.
	Results Orientation.
	Communication and Presentation Skills.
	Customer - Centric Mindset.
	Problem Solving.
	Accountability and Intaegrity.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@neohomeslimited.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

	Energetic, organised and socially confident.
	Able to plan and coordinate events.
	Prior community, social-media, events or customer-engagement experience is beneficial.


Salary
N400,000 monthly.

Ticketing Agent Job at JV Management Consulting




        
    

        
        JV Management Consulting - Our client, a reputable Travel and Tours Company, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Ticketing Agent

Job Location: Awoyaya, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Industry: Travel & Tours

Description
     

            
    




	Are you an experienced Ticketing Agent with a passion for delivering exceptional travel experiences? Our client is seeking a skilled and detail-oriented professional to join their team.
	As a Ticketing Agent, you will be responsible for managing flight reservations, issuing and reissuing tickets, handling itinerary changes, and providing excellent customer service to clients.
	The ideal candidate should have strong knowledge of airline reservation systems, fare rules, and travel documentation while ensuring seamless travel arrangements for customers.


Key Responsibilities


	Book, issue, reissue, and cancel domestic and international flight tickets.
	Handle flight reservations and itinerary modifications.
	Advise clients on the best flight options, fares, and travel routes.
	Process refunds, exchanges, and ticket revalidation in accordance with airline policies.
	Ensure accuracy of all travel bookings and documentation.
	Provide prompt and professional customer support before, during, and after ticket issuance.
	Stay updated on airline schedules, fare changes, travel regulations, and visa requirements.
	Resolve ticketing issues and customer complaints efficiently.
	Maintain accurate booking records and prepare periodic reports.
	Collaborate with the sales and operations teams to ensure excellent service delivery.


Requirements


	Minimum of 3 years of experience as a Ticketing Agent in a Travel and Tours Agency.
	Strong knowledge of airline ticketing procedures and fare rules.
	Proficiency in GDS platforms such as Amadeus, Galileo, or Sabre.
	Excellent customer service and communication skills.
	Strong attention to detail and high level of accuracy.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple bookings simultaneously.
	Good problem-solving and organizational skills.
	A Diploma or Bachelor's Degree in a relevant field is an added advantage.
	Professional certifications in airline ticketing or travel management will be an added advantage.


Salary & Benefits


	N200,000 – N250,000 per month (based on experience and qualifications).
	Opportunity to work with a growing and dynamic travel company.
	Professional and collaborative work environment.
	Career growth and development opportunities.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Ticketing Agent" as the subject of the email.
